meta.title: Orient — Your strategic partner in digital transformation
meta.description: Orient Digital Marketing & Software Solutions. Marketing, web design, e-commerce, mobile apps, and ERP/CRM systems based in Riyadh.

hero.tag: Your strategic partner in digital transformation
hero.title: We turn your ambitions into tangible digital reality
hero.subtitle: End-to-end digital marketing, software, and mobile solutions tailored to grow your business with measurable results.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything your business needs under one roof — from idea to launch.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.desc: Market analysis, audience targeting, and well-crafted seasonal campaigns.

social.title: Social Media Management
social.desc: Professional management with content design, copywriting, and community engagement.

web.title: Web Design
web.desc: Fast, responsive websites with full visual identity and SEO foundations.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: Complete store solutions on Salla, Zid, Shopify and WooCommerce.

video.title: Video & Motion Graphics
video.desc: Promo videos, explainer animations, and social media stories that convert.

seo.title: SEO
seo.desc: Keyword research, technical SEO, content optimization, and link building.

ads.title: Paid Advertising
ads.desc: Performance campaigns on Google, Meta, Snapchat, and TikTok.

software.title: Software Development
software.desc: Desktop apps, ERP/CRM systems, and process automation.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Native and cross-platform apps with Flutter, React Native, Swift, and Kotlin.

about.title: Why Orient?
about.subtitle: We don't ship templates — we craft custom strategies for every client.
about.p1: With more than ten years of experience, we've helped 500+ clients reach their digital goals with measurable, data-driven solutions.

values.v1d: Every plan is built around your goals and KPIs.
values.v2d: Marketers, developers, and designers under one roof.
values.v3d: We measure every step and improve continuously.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We're ready to answer your questions and discuss your next project.
contact.address: Riyadh, Al-Rayan district, Omar bin Abdul Aziz Street

footer.tagline: Invest your time with us — your strategic partner in digital transformation.
